questions: Do any of the 10 residual git stashes contain unincorporated source work, or are they all droppable cruft?
What test surface is needed to backfill the 3 unverified FEATURE_INDEX rows (uninstall/list/info)?

findings.detail: All 10 stashes touch only dist/install/transient artifacts; only non-artifact residue is a stale 1-line CLAUDE.md edit in stash@{5} (phase-65 era, superseded). Safe to git stash clear.
Already verified by tests/test_cli_install_gemini.py::test_gemini_uninstall_cleans_commands_dir (qor/install.py:114 _do_uninstall) but FEATURE_INDEX row marks it unverified with empty Test path.
qor/install.py:171 _do_list has no test; backfill: invoke _do_list --available/--installed, assert rc + enumerated skills.
qor/cli.py:25 _do_info has no test; backfill: invoke _do_info with known + bogus skill name, assert rc 0/1 + output.

sources: git stash list (10 entries, phase/45-90 era)
